zh.Erfweiler, Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, D: 德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯艾維利
zh.Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saar-Pfalz-Kreis,: 德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆
zh.Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saar-Pfalz-Kre: 德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Hurth於大約1580年出生在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利時，她的父親Peter Hurth26歲，母親Eva25歲。她於大約1600年與Paul Landorf結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1629年之後在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆。

zh-hans.Erfweiler, Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, D: 德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯艾維利
zh-hans.Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saar-Pfalz-Kreis,: 德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna Hurth于大约1580年出生在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利时，她的父亲Peter Hurth26岁，母亲Eva25岁。她于大约1600年与Paul Landorf结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1629年之后在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯格斯海姆賀比海姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hurth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hurt
meanings: English: variant of Hart . In Middle English, Old English heorot ‘hart’ became hurt west of a line running roughly from Dorking to Birmingham, and this has occasionally survived, though often replaced by the standard hart from hert.
German: topographic name from Middle High German hurt ‘hurdle, woven fence’.

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Hurth was born about 1580, in Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany, her father, Peter Hurth, was 26 and her mother, Eva, was 25. She married Paul Landorf about 1600. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1629, in Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany.

fr.Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saar-Pfalz-Kreis,: Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saar-Pfalz-Kre: Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Hurth est née environ 1580, à Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne, son père, Peter Hurth, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eva, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Paul Landorf environ 1600. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1629, à Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susanna Hurth um 1580 in Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Hurth 26 und ihre Mutter Eva 25. Sie hat um 1600 Paul Landorf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1629 in Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Hurth è nata il circa 1580 nel Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania, sua padre, Peter Hurth, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Eva, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Paul Landorf circa 1600. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1629, nel Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania.

ja.Erfweiler, Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, D: ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ピルマセンスエルフウエイラー
ja.Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saar-Pfalz-Kreis,: ドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスジャーシェイムハービトズヘイム
ja.Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saar-Pfalz-Kre: ドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスマンデルバチタルエルフウエイラー
ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Hurthが約1580年にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスマンデルバチタルエルフウエイラーで生まれた時，父Peter Hurthは26歳，母Evaは25歳であった。約1600年にPaul Landorfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1629年以後にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスジャーシェイムハービトズヘイムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Hurth(이)가 대략 1580년 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 먼델바ch탤 르프위러에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Hurth(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1600년 Paul Landorf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1629년 이후 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 그르셰임 허비츠하임에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Hurth nasceu aproximadamente 1580, em Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha, seu pai, Peter Hurth, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eva, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Paul Landorf aproximadamente 1600. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1629, em Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Hurth родилась около 1580 г. в местности эрфвилир, манделбачталь, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия, её отцу по имени Peter Hurth было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Paul Landorf около 1600 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1629 г. в местности хирбицхим, джиршим, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия.

sm.um 1580–nach 1629: e tusa o le 1580–ina ua ma'ea le 1629

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susanna Hurth nació aproximadamente 1580, en Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania, su papá, Peter Hurth, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Eva, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Paul Landorf aproximadamente 1600. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1629, en Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania.
